projects.name: Drupal
projects.description: Open source content management framework widely used for public-sector websites, service portals, and digital government publishing.

code.rationale: Mature release engineering and broad contributor base.

stewardship.rationale: Long-term stewardship through the Drupal Association and agencies.

accessibility.rationale: Strong accessibility history and testing practices.

sustainability.rationale: Diverse service ecosystem and long-term funding patterns.

security.rationale: Coordinated security team and disclosure process.

interoperability.rationale: Mature API and standards support.

procurement.rationale: Large public-sector support market and documentation.

community.rationale: Deep contributor ecosystem and events pipeline.

deployment_countries.note: Countries reflect visible public-sector deployments, not exhaustive usage.

projects.name: MOSIP
projects.description: Modular Open Source Identity Platform helping governments build foundational digital identity systems with interoperable components.
projects.govstack_notes: Atlas functional mapping to the GovStack Identity building block.

stewardship.rationale: Strong institutional home and implementation network.

public_sector.rationale: Direct public-sector adoption across multiple countries.

accessibility.rationale: Accessibility practices exist but need systematic evidence.

security.rationale: Good identity security posture with some open items.

interoperability.rationale: Central interoperability role in digital identity stacks.

procurement.rationale: Growing integrator ecosystem and deployment record.

community.rationale: Healthy but still concentrated contributor base.

governance_model.note: Based on published governance and institutional materials.
